metadata.description: Batch 50 - final 97 additional Oxford 5000 words; source-aligned from attached PDF

words.definitionEn: to weaken confidence, authority, or effectiveness gradually
words.example: Unstable lighting can undermine detection accuracy.

words.definitionEn: to accept responsibility for and begin a task
words.definitionTh: ดำเนินการรับผิดชอบ
words.example: The team will undertake a full validation.

words.definitionEn: without any doubt
words.definitionTh: อย่างไม่ต้องสงสัย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “undoubtedly”.

words.definitionEn: to open gradually or reveal a sequence of events
words.definitionTh: คลี่ออก / เปิดเผย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “unfold”.

words.definitionEn: having bad luck or causing regret
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “unfortunate”.

words.definitionEn: to bring separate parts into one system
words.definitionTh: รวมเป็นหนึ่ง
words.example: Use one schema to unify all vocabulary files.

words.definitionEn: to join people or groups together
words.example: The project unites production and engineering.

words.definitionEn: the state of being joined as one
words.definitionTh: ความเป็นเอกภาพ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “unity”.

words.definitionEn: applying to all people or situations
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “universal”.

words.definitionEn: never having happened or existed before
words.definitionTh: ไม่เคยมีมาก่อน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “unprecedented”.

words.definitionEn: to reveal something publicly for the first time
words.definitionTh: เปิดเผยต่อสาธารณะ
words.example: The supplier unveiled the upgraded camera.

words.definitionEn: expected to happen soon
words.definitionTh: ที่กำลังจะมาถึง
words.example: Prepare the checklist for the upcoming trial.

words.definitionEn: to improve equipment or software; an improvement
words.example: Upgrade the processor before deployment.

words.definitionEn: to support, maintain, or confirm a decision
words.definitionTh: ยืนยันและสนับสนุน
words.example: The design must uphold the safety standard.

words.definitionEn: requiring immediate attention
words.example: Escalate the urgent maintenance issue.

words.definitionEn: the way or amount that something is used
words.example: Monitor storage usage each month.

words.definitionEn: having no practical purpose
words.definitionTh: ไร้ประโยชน์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “useless”.

words.definitionEn: a useful service, system, or practical value
words.definitionTh: สาธารณูปโภค / ประโยชน์ใช้สอย
words.example: Evaluate the practical utility of each feature.

words.definitionEn: to use something effectively for a purpose
words.definitionTh: ใช้ประโยชน์
words.example: Utilize verified data for model training.

words.definitionEn: completely or to an extreme degree
words.definitionTh: อย่างสิ้นเชิง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “utterly”.

words.definitionEn: a space with little or no matter
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “vacuum”.

words.definitionEn: not clearly expressed or defined
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “vague”.

words.definitionEn: legally or logically acceptable
words.definitionTh: ถูกต้องใช้ได้
words.example: Confirm that each measurement is valid.

words.definitionEn: the quality of being correct or acceptable
words.definitionTh: ความถูกต้อง
words.example: Check the validity of the test method.

words.definitionEn: to disappear suddenly or completely
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “vanish”.

words.definitionEn: able to change; a value that can change
words.definitionTh: ตัวแปร / เปลี่ยนแปลงได้
words.example: Control each process variable.

words.definitionEn: a difference or change from a standard
words.definitionTh: ความผันแปร
words.example: Monitor product variation over time.

words.definitionEn: including several different types
words.example: Train the model with varied samples.

words.definitionEn: a tube carrying blood toward the heart
words.definitionTh: หลอดเลือดดำ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “vein”.

words.definitionEn: a project involving risk; to risk doing something
words.definitionTh: กิจการเสี่ยง / เสี่ยงทำ
words.example: The pilot is a joint digital venture.

words.definitionEn: relating to spoken words
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “verbal”.

words.definitionEn: an official decision after considering evidence
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “verdict”.

words.definitionEn: to check that something is true or accurate
words.definitionTh: ตรวจสอบยืนยัน
words.example: Verify every file before merging.

words.definitionEn: a line of poetry
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “verse”.

words.definitionEn: in comparison with or against
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “versus”.

words.definitionEn: standing straight up and down
words.example: Mount the camera on a vertical frame.

words.definitionEn: a container, ship, or tube carrying fluid
words.definitionTh: ภาชนะ / เรือ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “vessel”.

words.definitionEn: a person with long experience or former military service
words.definitionTh: ทหารผ่านศึก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “veteran”.

words.definitionEn: capable of working successfully
words.example: The trial confirmed a viable solution.

words.definitionEn: bright, energetic, and full of life
words.definitionTh: สดใสมีพลัง
words.example: Use a vibrant indicator color for alarms.

words.definitionEn: immoral behavior or a bad habit
words.definitionTh: ความชั่วร้าย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “vice”.

words.definitionEn: deliberately cruel or violent
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “vicious”.

words.definitionEn: a particular way of considering something
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “viewpoint”.

words.definitionEn: to break a law, rule, or right
words.example: Do not violate the safety interlock.

words.definitionEn: an act of breaking a law, rule, or right
words.example: Record every safety violation.

words.definitionEn: a morally good quality
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “virtue”.

words.definitionEn: an official permit to enter or remain in a country
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “visa”.

words.definitionEn: able to be seen
words.definitionTh: มองเห็นได้
words.example: The defect must be clearly visible.

words.definitionEn: relating to the voice or openly expressing opinions
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับเสียง / แสดงออกชัดเจน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “vocal”.

words.definitionEn: done by free choice
words.definitionTh: โดยสมัครใจ
words.example: Participation in the survey is voluntary.

words.definitionEn: the activity of choosing by vote
words.definitionTh: การลงคะแนน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “voting”.

words.definitionEn: to make a serious promise
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “vow”.

words.definitionEn: the state of being open to harm or attack
words.definitionTh: ความเปราะบาง
words.example: The review identified a network vulnerability.

words.definitionEn: easily harmed physically or emotionally
words.example: The exposed cable is vulnerable to damage.

words.definitionEn: to walk or move without a fixed route
words.definitionTh: เดินเรื่อยเปื่อย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “wander”.

words.definitionEn: a hospital department or administrative district
words.definitionTh: หอผู้ป่วย / เขต
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ward”.

words.definitionEn: a large building for storing goods
words.definitionTh: คลังสินค้า
words.example: Store spare parts in the warehouse.

words.definitionEn: organized armed conflict
words.definitionTh: การทำสงคราม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “warfare”.

words.definitionEn: an increase in temperature
words.definitionTh: ภาวะอุ่นขึ้น
words.example: Monitor motor warming during the test.

words.definitionEn: official authority or a reason justifying action
words.definitionTh: หมายศาล / รับรอง
words.example: The result may warrant further investigation.

words.definitionEn: a person experienced in fighting
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “warrior”.

words.definitionEn: to make less strong or effective
words.definitionTh: ทำให้อ่อนแอ
words.example: Vibration can weaken the mounting bracket.

words.definitionEn: to make cloth by crossing threads
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “weave”.

words.definitionEn: an unwanted wild plant
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “weed”.

words.definitionEn: happening once every week
words.definitionTh: รายสัปดาห์
words.example: Review the weekly defect trend.

words.definitionEn: strange or unusual
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “weird”.

words.definitionEn: health, happiness, and support of people
words.example: The policy protects employee welfare.

words.definitionEn: a deep hole for obtaining water or oil
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “well”.

words.definitionEn: the state of being healthy and comfortable
words.definitionTh: ความเป็นอยู่ที่ดี
words.example: The program supports employee well-being.

words.definitionEn: at all or of any kind
words.definitionTh: ใด ๆ ทั้งสิ้น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “whatsoever”.

words.definitionEn: a cereal crop used to make flour
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “wheat”.

words.definitionEn: by which or through which
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “whereby”.

words.definitionEn: to strike with a quick flexible movement
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “whip”.

words.definitionEn: any person who
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “whoever”.

words.definitionEn: completely or entirely
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “wholly”.

words.definitionEn: to make something broader
words.definitionTh: ทำให้กว้างขึ้น
words.example: Widen the camera field of view.

words.definitionEn: existing or happening over a large area
words.example: The update received widespread adoption.

words.definitionEn: a woman whose spouse has died
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “widow”.

words.definitionEn: the measurement from side to side
words.example: Measure the product width.

words.definitionEn: readiness to do something
words.definitionTh: ความเต็มใจ
words.example: Operator willingness supported adoption.

words.definitionEn: to clean by rubbing with a cloth
words.example: Wipe the lens with an approved cloth.

words.definitionEn: good judgment based on experience
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “wisdom”.

words.definitionEn: the ability to use clever humor or intelligence
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “wit”.

words.definitionEn: to remove oneself or take something back
words.example: Withdraw the invalid dataset.

words.definitionEn: the act of removing or taking something back
words.example: Document the reason for data withdrawal.

words.definitionEn: a wild animal related to the dog
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “wolf”.

words.definitionEn: all people available for employment
words.definitionTh: กำลังแรงงาน
words.example: Train the workforce before deployment.

words.definitionEn: a period of physical exercise
words.definitionTh: การออกกำลังกาย
words.example: The test was a useful workout for the system.

words.definitionEn: a place where people perform their jobs
words.example: Install the dashboard in the workplace.

words.definitionEn: a practical meeting for learning or creating
words.definitionTh: การประชุมเชิงปฏิบัติการ
words.example: Hold a technical workshop for operators.

words.definitionEn: a small long-bodied animal without legs
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “worm”.

words.definitionEn: to show deep respect or religious devotion
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “worship”.

words.definitionEn: worth the time, money, or effort
words.example: The automation trial was worthwhile.

words.definitionEn: deserving respect or attention
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “worthy”.

words.definitionEn: the joint connecting the hand and arm
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “wrist”.

words.definitionEn: to shout loudly
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “yell”.

words.definitionEn: an amount produced; to produce or give way
words.definitionTh: ผลผลิต / ยอมให้
words.example: The process yields reliable inspection data.
